strengths: ~20 years of continuous software engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and cloud, comfortably clearing the 15-year minimum
Recent hands-on AI work at re:cinq — MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure — demonstrates current, practical AI tooling exposure
Founder of GISCollective and early-stage startup contributions (WatchUp) show entrepreneurial initiative and end-to-end product ownership
concerns: No advanced degree (MS/PhD) in an AI or technical field; both educational credentials are bachelor's-level, one in fine arts — preferred qualification absent
AI experience is recent, narrow, and infrastructure-level (tooling, MCP frameworks) with no evidence of strategic advisory, enterprise AI platform leadership, or recognized external AI expertise

Career titles plateau at Senior/Staff Software Developer with no director-level IC, principal engineering, or cross-organizational technical leadership track record matching the seniority this role requires
response.justification: James brings a genuinely broad engineering background and recent AI tooling work that shows awareness of the agentic AI space, but the role demands a director-level individual contributor who can advise strategic customers, shape cloud and AI product strategy, and carry recognized external authority in AI — none of which his resume evidences. His AI exposure is too recent and too narrow, his educational credentials do not meet the preferred bar, and his career arc has remained firmly in senior/staff execution rather than technical leadership or external influence at the scale this position requires.
